title: Varadharaja Perumal Temple
tagline: Varadharaja Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Varadharaja Perumal Temple, also called Hastagiri, Attiyuran, Attigiri, Perarulalan Perumal temple, Kanchi koil, Thirukatchi, or Perumal koil is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu
overview.description: Varadharaja Perumal Temple, also called Hastagiri, Attiyuran, Attigiri, Perarulalan Perumal temple, Kanchi koil, Thirukatchi, or Perumal koil is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in the city of Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu believed to have been visited by the 12 poet saints, or the Alvars. It is located in a suburb of Kanchipuram known as the Vishnu Kanchi that is a home for many famous Vishnu temples. One of the greatest Hindu scholars of Vaishnava Vishishtadvaita philosophy, Ramanuja, is believed to have resided in this tem

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nazarethpettai
topPlaces.description: Nazarethpettai is a City approximately 10 kilometers north of Chennai. It is the birthplace of the former Chief Minister of Madras Presidency and leader of the Indian National Congress Minjur Bhaktavatsalam.

topPlaces.name: Sathyanatheswarar temple
topPlaces.description: Sathyanatheswarar Temple (also called Karaivananathar Temple or Thirukalimedu temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Thirukalimedu, near Indira Theertham Kanchipuram, Kanchipuram district in Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Sathyanatheswarar and his consort Parvathi as Pramarambikai.

topPlaces.name: Yathothkari Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruvekkaa Temple or Yathothkari Perumal Temple (locally called Sonnavannam Seitha Perumall) is a Hindu temple located in Kanchipuram in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu and dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Yathothkari Perumal, and his consort Lakshmi as Komalavalli.

topPlaces.name: Ashtabujakaram
topPlaces.description: The Ashtabujakaram or Ashtabuja Perumal Temple located in Kanchipuram in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Ashta Bhuja Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Alamelumangai.

topPlaces.name: Kanchipuram taluk
topPlaces.description: Kancheepuram taluk is a taluk of Kancheepuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kanchipuram.

topPlaces.name: Kanchipuram block
topPlaces.description: The Kanchipuram block is a revenue block in the Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 43 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Jama Mosque, Kanchipuram
topPlaces.description: The Jama Mosque, also known as the Jama Masjid and officially as the Sunnat Jama'ath Juma Masjid, is a Friday mosque, located in the town of Kanchipuram, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The mosque is situated adjacent to the Kanchi Kamakoti Peetham, a Hindu centre of learning.

topPlaces.name: Thenambakkam
topPlaces.description: Thenambakkam is a census town in Kancheepuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Thenambakkam old name Thenmaraiur.

items.note: Nazarethpettai is a City approximately 10 kilometers north of Chennai. It is the birthplace of the former Chief Minister of Madras Presidency and leader of the Indian National Congress Minjur Bhaktavatsalam.

Sathyanatheswarar Temple (also called Karaivananathar Temple or Thirukalimedu temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Thirukalimedu, near Indira Theertham Kanchipuram, Kanchipuram district in Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Sathyanatheswarar and his consort Parvathi as Pramarambikai.

Tiruvekkaa Temple or Yathothkari Perumal Temple (locally called Sonnavannam Seitha Perumall) is a Hindu temple located in Kanchipuram in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu and dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Yathothkari Perumal, and his consort Lakshmi as Komalavalli.

The Ashtabujakaram or Ashtabuja Perumal Temple located in Kanchipuram in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Ashta Bhuja Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Alamelumangai.
Kancheepuram taluk is a taluk of Kancheepuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Kanchipuram.
The Kanchipuram block is a revenue block in the Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 43 panchayat villages.

The Jama Mosque, also known as the Jama Masjid and officially as the Sunnat Jama'ath Juma Masjid, is a Friday mosque, located in the town of Kanchipuram, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The mosque is situated adjacent to the Kanchi Kamakoti Peetham, a Hindu centre of learning.
Thenambakkam is a census town in Kancheepuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Thenambakkam old name Thenmaraiur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Varadharaja Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Varadharaja Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Varadharaja Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Varadharaja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nazarethpettai, Sathyanatheswarar temple, Yathothkari Perumal Temple, Ashtabujakaram, Kanchipuram taluk.
